purpose: Define the bounded source request needed to advance SK from financial seed coverage to a Samsung-level first-transfer slice.
doNotAskFor: licensed analyst PDFs without model-use rights
audio or video files without public transcript/subtitle unless specifically needed

currentKnownOfficialEntryPoints.use: earnings presentation and IR material discovery
earnings presentation and energy/battery narrative discovery
holding-company IR archive and presentation discovery
earnings presentation and IR material discovery

requestedSourcePackages.name: SK Hynix memory and HBM narrative
askFor: latest four SK Hynix earnings presentation document URLs
latest SK Hynix annual report or DART receipt URL
latest public HBM/AI memory strategy presentation or transcript if available
latest capex or capacity expansion official material if used in claims
minimumMetadata: direct PDF/PPT URL or DART receipt URL

requestedSourcePackages.name: SK Innovation energy, battery, and merger narrative
askFor: latest four SK Innovation earnings presentation document URLs
latest SK Innovation annual report or DART receipt URL
latest official SK On battery strategy or earnings material if used in claims
latest official SK E&S merger, LNG, or energy-transition material if used in claims
latest shareholder-return, dividend, or capital-allocation material if used in claims
minimumMetadata: direct PDF/PPT URL or DART receipt URL

requestedSourcePackages.name: SK Inc. portfolio and shareholder value narrative
askFor: latest SK Inc. investor presentation document URL
latest annual report or DART receipt URL
latest value-up, shareholder-return, dividend, or capital-allocation document URL
current portfolio or investment-company explanation material
minimumMetadata: direct PDF/PPT URL or DART receipt URL

requestedSourcePackages.name: SK Telecom telecom, AI, and data-center narrative
askFor: latest four SK Telecom earnings presentation document URLs
latest annual report or DART receipt URL
latest public AI/data-center strategy material if used in claims
latest shareholder-return or dividend policy material
minimumMetadata: direct PDF/PPT URL or DART receipt URL

acceptanceCriteriaBeforeRuntimePromotion: Every narrative claim must have a companyId.
Every narrative claim must have a document-level public URL or DART receipt URL.
Every source must include period, issuer, rights level, and source role.
SK Hynix HBM and memory claims must not be inferred from stock price or news fixture.
SK Innovation energy, battery, merger, and portfolio-transition claims must not be inferred from broad energy category labels.
SK Telecom AI/data-center claims must not be inferred from broad telecom category labels.
SK Inc. portfolio and shareholder-return claims must preserve whether the claim is holding-company level or affiliate-specific.
nextActions: Collect document-level URLs for the four requested narrative source packages.
Create SK local source inventory only after files or exact URLs exist.
Generate SK wiki seed pages from source manifests.
Promote SK narrative claims after evidence locator review.
Create SK frozen scenarios after at least one financial and one narrative claim path pass.
